title: go-perf-agent verdict
description: Written to .go-perf-agent/runs/<id>/verdict.json by bench verdict/baseline and updated by the critic. status and a top-level reason sit at the root; the numeric result is nested under .verdict, so query .verdict.delta, not .delta.

status.description: proved (benchstat win + tests pass), rejected (no win / regression / tests fail), need_more_data (no faithful benchmark, within noise, dependency opt-in, or needs prod data)

reason.description: root-level reason, set for need_more_data placeholders (opt-in / benchmark-needs-authoring)

verdict.description: the numeric result, filled by the gate (bench verdict)

delta.description: benchstat delta on the proof metric, e.g. -76.55%

benchstat.description: the full benchstat table, baseline vs candidate

critic.description: filled by the reflexion critic pass (can only downgrade a proved)
